plugins.name: spec-review
plugins.description: Multi-agent spec review skill for catching ambiguity, gaps, and risks before implementation

plugins.name: issue-to-spec
plugins.description: Orchestrates the investigation and spec authoring workflow from a GitHub issue through interview, spec writing, complexity assessment, and optional spec review hardening

plugins.name: complexity-check
plugins.description: Adversarial cross-model debate to catch unnecessary complexity in specs and PRs before peer review
